title: Snek's Enhanced Vanilla
description: A collection of mods that improve Minecraft Vanilla without changing any of its core mechanics.
body:
# Snek's Enhanced Vanilla
A modpack that aims to improve **Minecraft Vanilla** without changing its core mechanics or adding content that feels out of place. Ideal for Vanilla players who enjoy the original feel but want a cleaner experience. Great for small or private servers :3

This pack adds:
- Optimization mods for both the server and client
- QOL features such as mass move and crafting, vein mine and tree felling
- Better sounds and visual improvements
- Technical mods to aid building and designing redstone contraptions
- Tom's Storage as an alternative to Vanilla's chests
- Social interactions: player heads in chat, player leashing, headpats, pinging
- **Vertical slabs**! And **no Phantoms**!

## For redstone engineers
Mob AI, block properties, player interactions, loot tables and redstone behaviour match those of Vanilla, aside from a few minor changes:
- Endermen are not able to pick up or place blocks
- Phantoms have been removed
- The "use item" action can harvest crops. Farmland can't be trampled by mobs or players
- Experience orbs are merged automatically. This bypasses the vanilla xp absorption rate limit

This modpack includes Tweakeroo, Litematica, World Edit, Technical Utilities, MiniHUD, Carpet Mod, Carpet Extra.
